settings.subtitle: Floral Blossom + Pro-Vitamin B5
settings.description: A light, refreshing hair mist infused with floral notes and nourishing vitamins to leave your hair smelling divine and feeling silky smooth throughout the day.

settings.label: GOOD FOR:
settings.value: All hair types, especially dry or dull hair needing a refresh

settings.label: FEELS LIKE:
settings.value: A weightless mist that dries instantly without any sticky residue

settings.label: LOOKS LIKE:
settings.value: Shiny, healthy-looking hair with reduced static and flyaways

settings.label: SMELLS LIKE:
settings.value: A fresh, blooming bouquet of spring flowers with a hint of musk

settings.title: A refreshing aromatic mist for SOFT + SCENTED hair.
floral extract blend
settings.description: delivers a long-lasting, elegant scent while providing antioxidant protection to the hair

settings.title: pro-vitamin b5
settings.description: known to strengthen and hydrate the hair strand for improved elasticity and shine

settings.title: what's inside
settings.intro: Crafted with premium aromatic compounds and hair-health vitamins to refresh and protect.
settings.footer_text: also made with GLYCERIN, ALOE VERA, KERATIN AMINO ACIDS, SILK PROTEIN, AND VITAMIN E

settings.description: SAID THEIR HAIR SMELT FRESH ALL DAY
SAID IT ADDED A HEALTHY SHINE INSTANTLY
SAID THEIR HAIR FELT WEIGHTLESS AND SMOOTH

settings.footnote: Based on a 1-week consumer perception study with daily application.

settings.question: Can I use this on wet hair?
settings.answer: Yes, it can be used on both damp and dry hair to refresh and help with detangling.

settings.question: Will it make my hair oily?
settings.answer: Not at all. The formula is lightweight and water-based, specifically designed to be non-greasy.

settings.question: Is it safe for colored hair?
settings.answer: Yes, it is sulfate-free and safe for color-treated or chemically-treated hair.

settings.title: FAQ
settings.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Floral Blossom Hair Mist.
